title: The Midnight Library
author: Matt Haig
description: A novel about life choices and second chances across parallel lives.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: Practical strategies for building good habits and breaking bad ones.

title: Dune

title: Educated

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
